name: fastapi
tagline: FastAPI coding conventions: Annotated params/deps, response models, SSE/JSON-lines streaming, frontend serving, and preferred tooling.
verdict: Well-structured best-practices reference: concrete, code-backed rules, deterministic defaults for ambiguous forks (e.g. async/sync), and good context economy via on-demand references/*.md files. No security concerns. Missing negative triggers and any versioning signal.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' or exclusion text anywhere, despite covering many broad FastAPI/Python topics that could misfire on adjacent tasks.
No version field, changelog heading, or dated revision notes anywhere in the skill.
